## Title 43
### Chapter 484B
##### § 484B.037 — “Person with a disability of moderate duration” defined.

“Person with a disability of moderate duration” has the meaning ascribed to it in NRS 482.3833 .

subsections.text: “Person with a disability of moderate duration” has the meaning ascribed to it in NRS 482.3833 .
